resumeTech.title: Application Software Development Intern
description: Developed and deployed code in an Angular and Golang environment while utilizing Docker to build internal tools utilized by over 150 team members.
Worked in an agile development framework and participated in daily SCRUM meetings with a team of 13 people to demonstrate progress and ask team members questions for guidance.
Communicated with other team members, dozens of interns, and upper management to accomplish goals and solve problems.

resumeTech.title: Vice President of Internal Affairs
description: Lead the general body of the organization with over 20 members, organizing and leading weekly meetings and events.
Created and managed the budget for the 2022-2023 Fiscal Year using Microsoft Excel and presented it before an approval Advisory Board.
Increased general body membership by 15% and intra-organizational communication by creating a weekly newsletter and running weekly body meetings.

resumeTraining.title: High School Math and Computer Science Teacher
description: Taught 5 unique classes in high school mathematics such as Pre-Calculus and Probability and Statistics, and 2 classes in IT and Computing centered around the CompTIA+ certification.
Developed relationships with over 100 students and ensured all scholars felt welcomed and attended to with personalized feedback and direct encouragement.

Designed and implemented long-range curriculums, invigorating lesson plans, and personal improvement plans for a diverse body of students, ensuring that each learner was addressed, using tools for curriculum building and hands-on labs such as CodeHS and the Google Suite to maintain a pass rate of 95%.
Communicated and coordinated with dozens of faculty members, administration, and hundreds of parents to ensure student success in and out of the classroom.

resumeTraining.title: Student Teacher
description: Taught two sections of Mathematics and AP Computer Science under the advisement of a coaching teacher to develop my teaching abilities.

Built and implemented a detailed and equitable Student Learning Objective plan that addressed the specific needs for 42 students with a variety of learning styles in my classes over the course of 1 semester.
Developed relationships with dozens of students and coordinated with their families to create specialized education plans that worked with their unique learning needs.

resumeTraining.title: Computer Science Teaching Assistant
description: Helped over 100 Computer Science students with a variety of problems in a Java Environment through mediating in-person and virtual meetings through Microsoft Teams.
Communicated with students, their instructor, and other graduate and undergrad TAs to facilitate a course pass rate of over 80%.
Created and mediated dozens of meetings to help students and answer questions.

resumeTraining.title: Climbing Wall Instructor
resumeTraining.company: Strom Thurmond Wellness and Fitness Center
description: Worked and communicated with 5 other instructors and management to regulate shifts at the climbing wall.
Instructed and oversaw safety precautions and proper climbing techniques for dozens of gym members daily, developing instructional methodologies.
Managed upkeep of existing climbing routes and creating new routes on the wall through customer feedback and creative thinking.

resumeService.title: Wait Staff
description: Prepped, cooked, and served the 50 residents of the home while also washing and preparing dishes for the chefs.
Created personal bonds with all 50 residents making them feel more comfortable and at home.
Communicated and built bonds with my coworkers, utilizing teamwork to solve tough problems.

resumeService.title: Front Service Clerk
description: Bagged and delivered groceries to hundreds of customers every day.
Communicated with cashiers, other departments, and upper management to solve problems with customers and in the workplace.
Conversed with hundreds of customers a day creating a personal bond to enhance shopping experiences and allowing provided feedback with our service.

resumeService.title: Expo & Pantry Chef
description: Cooked food for dozens of customers a night through communication with the chef staff, wait staff, and costumers.
Prepared food for service by ensuring that each order is perfected through an ability to work in a fast-paced environment and a strong attention-to-detail.
Heavily cleaned workstations, organized shelves and cabinets, and readied materials for subsequent shifts.

resumeService.title: Usher & Stagehand
description: Conversed with hundreds of patrons daily to ensure safety and enhance their experiences with dozens of shows year-round.
Worked with 10 other ushers, over 20 other stagehands, and upper management to properly set-up and run various types of performances, as well as coordinating and solving difficult problems.

resumeService.title: Team Member
description: Handled money as a cashier and worked with dozens of customers daily at the register and on the floor to ensure a meaningful shopping experience.
Communicated with 15 other team members and upper management to solve problems and manage daily tasks, including feeding and caring for multiple species of animals.
Arranged and sorted hundreds of products utilizing UPC codes on shelves, and fulfilled customer requests in-store and online.

resumeService.title: General Staff
description: Prepared and served hundreds of sandwiches per day, ensuring customer satisfaction through attention-to-detail, timeliness, and feedback.
Communicated and used teamwork with coworkers and managers to maintain productivity and properly serve customers.
Cleaned and readied workstations between shifts to maintain proper food safety and workflow.
